jobs.description:
<p>We’re seeking an experienced Senior Security Engineer with a strong passion for <strong>Identity and Access Management(IAM) </strong>and proven expertise in <strong>cloud-native environments</strong>, particularly <strong>AWS</strong>. Our documentation is a core product surface and often the first interface that developers encounter, so it must clearly reflect the system's actual behavior. This role goes beyond writing.
